{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":236},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7527093122422653758","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"番茄只为了看东村的书，太好看了，几个主角目前最喜欢的就是陈成，满头白发运筹帷幄的感觉，同时也感叹新书主角沈从安的悲惨家庭，我最起码以为教七老板武术的那个不用死的，可惜了，还有七老板的老虎啥时候安排上，最后希望一天6章[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752544541,"group_id":"7496844059567197208","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5qAFiDpwkbq5GVNYBC2Ck8INaaZ2ixduLVN3NakWjdc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"4199736228457452","user_name":"熏五东"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4199736228457452","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7496844059567197208","book_info":{"abstract":"（现实、年代、江湖恩怨、商战官斗、不后宫、不爽文！本书分为国内，国外两部分！国内部分节奏偏慢时代感较强，国外部分节奏快，极其刺激！可选择性阅读，无障碍。）
江湖之恶，恶在人心！
翻开书本讲得都是仁义道德，但底下压着的却只有一个利字！
混迹于极恶江湖之中，好人不会死、坏人不会死，只有蠢人才会死！
一场大火，八条人命！
